title: The Role of MNX1-AS1 in Ovarian Cancer Resistance and Tumor Progression via RNA-RNA Interactions.
snippet: Ovarian cancer (OC) remains one of the deadliest gynecological malignancies, largely due to late diagnosis and the emergence of resistance to platinum-based chemotherapy. Long non-coding RNAs (lncRNAs) have recently emerged as key regulators of tumor progression and therapeutic adaptation. In this study, we performed integrative transcriptomic profiling of....
